__comment: Shared TypeScript preset for Node-based backend services and the API gateway. Extends tsconfig.base.json with options that every such package sets identically today (CommonJS, strict mode, inline source maps, `jsx: react` for TSX handlers, emit to `build/`). Package tsconfigs still set per-package options like `target`, `paths`, `typeRoots`, `baseUrl`, `rootDir`, `types`, `files`, `include`, `exclude`, and the `ts-node` block — those legitimately vary or are not inherited by `extends`.
